name: commission-system-vercel-proxy-only
description: Vercel frontend and API proxy for the commission system with legacy browser transports removed.

scripts.check:api: node --check api/_gasProxyCommon.js && node --check api/gas.js && node --check api/login.js && node --check api/public-config.js
scripts.build: python3 tools/generate_vercel_env.py && python3 tools/sync_frontend_partials.py --check && npm run check:api && python3 tools/phaseG_security_gate.py && python3 tools/phaseK_write_schema_gate.py && python3 tools/phaseN_legacy_transport_gate.py
